name: Harvest Pumpkin Drop Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. PREHEAT the oven to 375°F.
2. COMBINE flour, baking powder, cinnamon, baking soda, salt, and allspice in a medium bowl.
3. BEAT butter and sugar in a large bowl with an electric mixer at medium speed until light and fluffy.
4. BEAT in pumpkin, egg, and vanilla.
5. GRADUALLY ADD the flour mixture, beating at low speed until well blended.
6. STIR in chopped pecans and cranberries with a spoon.
7. DROP heaping tablespoonfuls of dough 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets.
8. FLATTEN slightly with the back of a spoon.
9. PRESS one pecan half into the center of each cookie.
10. BAKE for 10 to 12 minutes, or until golden brown. Let cookies stand on cookie sheets for 1 minute; transfer to wire racks to cool completely.
11. STORE tightly covered at room temperature or freeze up to 3 months.
Makes about 36 cookies
Note: If dried cranberries are not available, substitute raisins or currants.
